title: Monitoring Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger monitoring foundations judgment so ai / automation work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Monitoring Foundations is a leverage point inside ai / automation. It supports the broader goal of workflow automation, copilots, agentic systems, and leverage through tooling.
coreConcepts: Monitoring Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good monitoring foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Monitoring Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
